Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: 3-D printed ultrastrong heat-resistant aluminum alloy achieved by bioinspired nanoscale amorphous confinement

Composition_Info.Note: Al-8.5Fe-1.3V-1.7Si nominal composition; 2 wt% TiB2 nanoparticles (50-100 nm) added as nucleating agents; powder size range 15-53 um with D50 of 34.3 um

Process_Text.original: Gas-atomized FVS0812 powder (Al-8.5Fe-1.3V-1.7Si, wt.%) mixed with 2 wt% TiB2 nanoparticles (50-100 nm) by mechanical stirring in anhydrous ethanol at 1000 rpm for 3 h; dried in vacuum oven at 60 C for 48 h; LPBF performed using EP-M150 Metal 3D Printer under argon atmosphere with laser power 150 W, scan speed 1000 mm/s, scan spacing 0.08 mm, layer thickness 0.02 mm; build platform preheated to 200 C; cooled to room temperature and ultrasonically cleaned.
Process_Text.simplified: LPBF of FVS0812 alloy with 2 wt% TiB2 nanoparticles; EP-M150 printer; 150 W, 1000 mm/s, 0.08 mm spacing, 0.02 mm layer, Ar atmosphere, 200 C build plate

Process_Info.Equipment: EP-M150 Metal 3D Printer (Hangzhou Eplus 3d Tech, China)

Microstructure_Text.original: Dominant fusion zone (~80%) with heat-affected zone near pool boundary; equiaxed grains (~1.6 um) with subtle columnar grains; alpha-Al cells (~67 nm diameter) with continuous amorphous cell boundaries (~14 nm wide, ~38% volume fraction); Fe and Si enriched at cell boundaries, Al depleted; TiV nucleation cores (~50 nm) enriched with Ti and V within grains; ~1% Al8Fe2Si precipitates (1-2 um); amorphous boundaries confirmed by TEM FFT patterns and DSC exothermic peak.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Equiaxed grain structure (~1.6 um); alpha-Al cells (~67 nm) with continuous amorphous boundaries (~14 nm, ~38 vol%); TiV nucleants; Al8Fe2Si precipitates (~1%)

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.XRD: D8 Discover (Cu-Ka), micro-XRD (Co-Ka, 0.5 mm beam); amorphous phase indicated by broad diffuse scattering hump at 2theta 45-55 deg
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.SEM: Apreo S LoVac; EBSD at 20 kV, 13 nA beam current
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.TEM: FEI Talos F200X at 200 kV; FEI Themis Z spherical aberration-corrected TEM; SAED patterns confirm amorphous cell boundaries
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.APT: LEAP 5000X (CAMECA); UV laser 60 pJ, 100 kHz, 50 K; cell boundary composition: Al 59-77%, Fe 14-27%, Si 4-13%, V 0-4%, Ti 0-1%
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.DSC: DSC 204 F1 Phoenix; 10 K/min heating rate; exothermic peak attributed to amorphous phase crystallization

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8 dog-bone, gauge 10 x 2 x 1 mm
ASTM E8 dog-bone, gauge 10 x 2 x 1 mm
Properties_Info.Note: Room temperature tensile test; among highest UTS for 3D-printed Al alloys

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8 dog-bone, gauge 10 x 2 x 1 mm
Properties_Info.Note: Room temperature tensile test; elongation to fracture

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 573.15 K (300 C); applied stresses 100 MPa and 150 MPa
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Cylindrical, gauge diameter 3 mm, gauge length 40 mm
Properties_Info.Note: Creep rate reduced by 1-3 orders of magnitude compared to other Al alloys; GNCJ-30 testing machine with high-temperature extensometer

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; indentation depth 0.1 um; indent spacing 1 um; loading rate 0.05 um/s; 2000 data points
Properties_Info.Note: Fusion zone hardness; heterogeneous distribution map generated

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; indentation depth 0.1 um; indent spacing 1 um; loading rate 0.05 um/s; 2000 data points
Properties_Info.Note: Heat-affected zone hardness near pool boundary; heterogeneous distribution map generated

Composition_Info.Note: Same alloy as printed; after thermal exposure at 300 C for 100 h; Al-8.5Fe-1.3V-1.7Si nominal composition with 2 wt% TiB2

Process_Text.original: Same as-printed FVS0812 + TiB2 alloy thermally exposed at 300 C for 100 h in air or inert atmosphere; followed by tensile testing from room temperature to 400 C.
Process_Text.simplified: FVS0812 + TiB2 as-printed alloy after thermal exposure at 300 C for 100 h

Microstructure_Text.original: Grain size ~1.95 um (marginal increase from ~1.6 um); fusion zone fraction decreased to ~63%; alpha-Al cells ~72 nm diameter comparable to as-printed; amorphous phase largely preserved in fusion zone with continuous network; limited Al12(FeV)3Si nanocrystals in network; HAZ shows interconnected Al12(FeV)3Si nanocrystals at cell boundaries with nanoscale gaps compromising network integrity.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Good thermal stability; grain size ~1.95 um; cells ~72 nm; amorphous phase largely preserved with partial crystallization; HAZ with nanocrystalline boundaries

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.XRD: Micro-XRD; weakened broad diffuse scattering hump indicating partial crystallization
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.TEM: FFT patterns show absence of periodic diffraction spots confirming preserved amorphous phase
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.DSC: DSC 204 F1; weakened exothermic peak due to partial crystallization

Composition_Info.Note: FVS0812 alloy without TiB2 nanoparticle addition; used as comparison baseline; Al-8.5Fe-1.3V-1.7Si composition

Process_Text.original: FVS0812 powder processed by LPBF without TiB2 nanoparticle addition; same LPBF parameters as TiB2-containing alloy (150 W, 1000 mm/s, 0.08 mm spacing, 0.02 mm layer, Ar, 200 C build plate).
Process_Text.simplified: LPBF of FVS0812 without TiB2; EP-M150 printer; same parameters as TiB2 version

Process_Info.Equipment: EP-M150 Metal 3D Printer (Hangzhou Eplus 3d Tech, China)

Microstructure_Text.original: Coarse columnar grain structure with average grain size ~7.3 um (compared to ~1.6 um with TiB2); no grain refinement from TiB2 nanoparticles; poor formability with high tendency for cracking and edge warping; restricts structural integrity and dimensional accuracy.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Coarse columnar grains (~7.3 um); poor printability with cracking tendency
